# visualpde.com

> VisualPDE brings interactive science and mathematics to the web. Explore topics including waves, viruses and reaction—diffusion patterns, or create your own simulation.

## Home

[VisualPDE](https://visualpde.com): VisualPDE brings interactive science and mathematics to the web. Explore topics including waves, viruses and reaction—diffusion patterns, or create your own simulation.
[VisualPDE](https://visualpde.com/): VisualPDE brings interactive science and mathematics to the web. Explore topics including waves, viruses and reaction—diffusion patterns, or create your own simulation.

[About | VisualPDE](https://visualpde.com/about/): VisualPDE brings interactive science and mathematics to the web. Explore topics including waves, viruses and reaction—diffusion patterns, or create your own simulation.

## Sim

[Simulation | VisualPDE](https://visualpde.com/sim/): An interactive simulation of a partial differential equation, live in your browser with VisualPDE.

[Explore | VisualPDE](https://visualpde.com/explore): VisualPDE brings interactive science and mathematics to the web. Explore topics including waves, viruses and reaction—diffusion patterns, or create your own simulation.
